message:
refactor(browser): modularize SQL and search modules

Split large files into focused ~500-line modules:

Phase 6 - query-planner.js (1,393 → 4 modules):
- statistics-manager.js (351 lines) - Column statistics
- cost-model.js (144 lines) - Query cost estimation
- planner-single.js (289 lines) - Single-table planning
- query-planner.js (327 lines) - Core planner

Phase 7 - parser.js (1,293 → 3 modules):
- parser-expr.js (383 lines) - Expression parsing
- parser-advanced.js (335 lines) - CTEs, window functions
- parser.js (562 lines) - Core parser

Phase 8 - ivf-index.js (1,254 → 4 modules):
- ivf-auxiliary.js (315 lines) - Auxiliary metadata
- ivf-manifest.js (440 lines) - Manifest parsing
- ivf-partitions.js (311 lines) - Partition data
- ivf-index.js (249 lines) - Core index class

Bundle size: 555KB (reduced from 568KB)
